name: config_invalidation
description: Smoke test: read config.py, edit it mid-session, then re-read to confirm the proxy serves the new version (cache invalidation path)
task_prompt:
TURN 1 OF 4

Read archolith_proxy/config.py in full. Report the exact default value of `proxy_port` and `cold_start_turns`. Do not create or modify any files yet. Just output those two values and stop.

follow_up_turns.message:
TURN 2 OF 4

Edit archolith_proxy/config.py. In the Settings class, add this new field on a new line immediately after the `proxy_port: int = 9800` line:

    smoke_test_marker: str = "cache_invalidation_test"

Use the Edit tool. After the edit, re-read archolith_proxy/config.py and confirm the new field is present. Output the exact line you added.

TURN 3 OF 4

Re-read archolith_proxy/config.py from scratch now. Find smoke_test_marker and output its default value exactly as it appears in the file. Do not rely on memory — read the file fresh.

TURN 4 OF 4

Re-read archolith_proxy/config.py one final time. Count all fields defined in the Settings class and confirm smoke_test_marker is still present with value "cache_invalidation_test".

checkpoints.description: config.py was edited and contains the smoke_test_marker field
